future_actions_in_order: verify explicit approval phrase exactly
pre-audit DB/active/hosts/source runner/source cache/source manifest/source index/target service/target timer/future opt runner
create backup directory
backup current target service if exists
backup current target timer if exists
backup existing future safe runner if exists
create /opt/coinoskobi/bin if missing with mode 0o755
copy source runner to temporary file under /opt/coinoskobi/bin
verify temporary runner sha256 equals expected source runner sha
chmod temporary runner 0o644
atomic replace/move temporary runner to final /opt runner path
write projected service file to target service path
leave target timer unchanged unless missing and projected timer restoration is required
verify target service sha256 equals projected service sha
verify target timer sha256 equals expected timer sha
verify final /opt runner sha256 equals source runner sha
create rollback script
do not daemon-reload in R5
do not service start/restart/reset-failed in R5
do not timer enable/start in R5

future_rollback_rules: restore target service from backup if it existed before R5
remove target service only if it did not exist before R5 and R5 created it
restore target timer from backup if changed; normally timer should be unchanged
restore /opt runner from backup if it existed before R5
remove /opt runner only if it did not exist before R5 and R5 created it
do not daemon-reload automatically from rollback unless explicitly approved in later phase
do not start/enable timer/service from rollback
do not mutate DB/active panel/source runner/API/policy/trade
